title: turnera orientalis
intro: Turnera orientalis, also known as Damiana, is a flowering plant native to the Americas, particularly in the southern United States, Mexico, and Central America. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, saponins, and terpenoids, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and enhancing libido, as well as offering anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, Damiana has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
